from app.parser.excel_parser import parse_excel
from app.analysis.ratio_calculator import calculate_ratios
from app.analysis.anomaly_detector import detect_anomalies
from app.analysis.trend_analyzer import analyze_trends

stmt = parse_excel\('Data/12_Month_Statement_secesml_accrual-2.xlsx'\)
print\('Property:', stmt.property_name\)

print\('\\nKEY FIGURES \(annual totals\):'\)
labels = {
    'gross_potential_rent': 'GPR', 'total_revenue': 'Total Revenue',
    'total_operating_expenses': 'Total OpEx', 'noi': 'NOI',
    'vacancy_loss': 'Vacancy Loss', 'net_income': 'Net Income', 'cash_flow': 'Cash Flow',
}
for k, lbl in labels.items\(\):
    item = stmt.get_figure\(k\)
    if item:
        print\(f'  {lbl}: {item.annual_total:,.2f} \(row {item.row_number}\)'\)
    else:
        print\(f'  {lbl}: NOT FOUND'\)

print\('\\nRATIOS:'\)
ratios = calculate_ratios\(stmt\)
for name, r in ratios.ratios.items\(\):
    print\(f'  {r.label}: {r.pct_display\(\)} [{r.status}]'\)

anomalies = detect_anomalies\(stmt\)
print\(f'\\nAnomalies: {len\(anomalies\)}'\)
for a in anomalies:
    print\(f'  [{a.severity}] {a.line_item_label} \({a.cell_ref}\): {a.description[:80]}'\)
" 2>&1)

from app.parser.excel_parser import parse_excel
from app.analysis.ratio_calculator import calculate_ratios
from app.analysis.anomaly_detector import detect_anomalies

stmt = parse_excel\('Data/12_Month_Statement_secesml_accrual-2.xlsx'\)
ratios = calculate_ratios\(stmt\)
anomalies = detect_anomalies\(stmt\)
print\(f'Total anomalies: {len\(anomalies\)}'\)
by_sev = {}
for a in anomalies:
    by_sev.setdefault\(a.severity, []\).append\(a\)
for sev in ['high','medium','low']:
    items = by_sev.get\(sev, []\)
    print\(f'\\n  [{sev.upper\(\)}] {len\(items\)} issues:'\)
    for a in items:
        print\(f'    {a.line_item_label} \({a.cell_ref}\): {a.description[:75]}'\)
" 2>&1)
